core_mechanism: a spectrum-preserving duality that reduces a continuous second-order (self-adjoint) differential operator defined on a network to an equivalent discrete tridiagonal nearest-neighbor difference operator, mapping the continuum problem onto a one-dimensional recurrence with the same spectral data
brief_reason: The abstract extends the Kronig-Penney-to-Jacobi-matrix correspondence to Schroedinger operators on graphs, i.e. an exact map from a continuous operator on a network to a discrete tridiagonal (Jacobi) matrix.
